## **Zebra Trailer Inspection and Release Verification Checklist**

(for documentation of inspection of trucks, trailers, flatbeds, boxcars, intermodal containers, etc.)
Metadata: "Sub heading": "Zebra Trailer Inspection and Release Verification Checklist: ........(for documentation of inspection of trucks, trailers, flatbeds, boxcars, intermodal containers, etc.)........."

Text:
| | Primary Controls:
dock locks, green/red lights, glad hand locks, jack stands, boxcar breaks,trailer is properly supported via dollies and/or other
adequate support mechanisms; and truck engine is not running.
**Wheel chocks MUST be in place to prevent trailer movement**. | | | | | | | | | YES | NO | N/A | | Notes for any NO answers | | | Trailer seal and paperwork match | | | | | | | | Trailer seal intact / not broken / free of moisture | | | | | | | | Trailer / product free of rodent / insect infestation | | | | | | | | Trailer free of inappropriate odors | | | | | |

| | Trailer Physical Condition: What to look for. | | | | | | | | Front Wall: Wall colors & blocks close to the vent | | | | | | | | Left Sides:
Repairs visible in & out | | | | | | | | Right Sides:
Repairs visible in & out | | | | | | | | Interior Flooring: Steps or raised platforms | | | | | | | | Ceiling & Roof:
Welding visible in & out | | | | | |

| | Doors Inside/Outside: Locking Mechanisms
Outside Undercarriage: Support beams visible & | | | | | | | | uncovered. | | | | | | | | Pallets / product / trailer is clean | | | | | | | Product labeled correctly | | | | | | | | Product mixture is compatible / not objectionable | | | | | | | | | Product / packaging free of damage | | | | | |

|                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |     |         |     |          |                          |
|                                                   | For Outbound Loads: If NO to any of the above questions, the trailer should be rejected and the customer and carrier notified immediately.                                                                                                                                               |     |         |     |          |                          |
|                                                   | For Inbound Loads: If NO to any of the above questions, the customer should be contacted to approve / reject the load. (If a spill issue, Hazmat                                                                                                                                         |     |         |     |          |                          |
|                                                   | warehouses should not release the trailer.) Carrier should be notified. For food grade, medical or other shipment where required: If seal does not                                                                                                                                       |     |         |     |          |                          |
|                                                   | match paperwork, immediately halt work and notify Manager. For Bonded CFS: If seal does not match paperwork, immediately halt work and notify                                                                                                                                            |     |         |     |          |                          |
|                                                   | Manager. Further investigation is required, and a Customs Official must be notified to view the deconsolidation at their discretion. For mold or                                                                                                                                         |     |         |     |          |                          |

|                                                   | infestation, immediately halt work, notify Manager, shut doors and remove trailer from dock area.                                                                                                                                                                                        |     |         |     |          |                          |
